description: Recto: Fragment from the bottom of a legal document. On parchment. Referring to an agreement between [... b.] Meshullam and his wife Maymūna, possibly concerning a dowry. Signed by Avraham b. Yiṣḥaq ha-Talmid and Ṣedaqa b. David ha-Kohen (also signed ENA 3475.5 (PGPID 11347)). There is a diagram in the right margin. Dating: ca. second half of the 11th century. Verso: Arabic and Hebrew jottings (mentioning the son of Sayyid al-Kull?) and a drawing. (Information mainly from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
